impact: Creates the narrow JSON evidence-map prerequisite for checkbox-15 recovery using source-inventory evidence references only, without adding lifecycle process-model code or automation behavior.
summary: Add a fixture-only extension lifecycle evidence map under ppd/tests/fixtures/lifecycle.
target_task: Task checkbox-16: Recovery for checkbox-15: add a JSON-only extension lifecycle evidence map fixture at `ppd/tests/fixtures/lifecycle/extension_lifecycle_evidence_map.json` with exactly one extension category, source inventory evidence IDs only, required citation fields, and no process-model implementation code.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
